title: 桜花賞の後に・迷えるloser

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh! How laaaaame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dust has cleared at Oka Sho, and Vodka's
regretful cries at failing to beat Daiwa Scarlet
echo through the blue sky above us.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Lame! Lame! Laaaaame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Not winning is lame too, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
More than anything, the lamest thing is how
relieved I feel.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Classics are crazy... That feeling in your chest
after you finish runnin'...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her first race in the Classics, Vodka seems
to be feeling rather emotional.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Good race, Vodka. Now then, have you realized
my true skill?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I admit you've gotten strong too. Still no better
than number two, though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Why you little... Don't get too carried away!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And don't you forget! The Classics are only just
gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wait till next time! I'll show you! I'm gonna take
you down!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, I can't wait. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
After all, my excellence only stands out even
more with you chasing me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't wait. See you at the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You'd better not chicken out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I couldn't win, Trainer, and for also for
gettin' too heated.
choice_data_list: What do you want to do about the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The Derby?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and her rival have a heated competition.
But it can't continue unconditionally...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I dunno what I should do.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't just give in after she's just beaten me. Of
course I wanna make up for the loss.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
More than that, I wanna run against her again!
She showed some real strength today.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But... I have another dream that I can't give up
on, either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's rivalry with Daiwa Scarlet will only get
more complicated after the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Run in the Derby or run against her rival. This
time, choosing both is not an option.
choice_data_list:
What should I put down for your next race? For
now, at least.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If it's just for now, keep me on for the Derby.
But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I gotta think for a bit. Actually, would ya mind
thinkin' about it with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka's expression grows dark and heavy.
